name: HYDRA
description: 402-native regulatory intelligence API for autonomous agents. 55+ paid endpoints from $0.001 USDC via x402 on Base L2. Real-time data from 13 authoritative sources: FRED (28 economic series), BLS, Treasury, SEC EDGAR, Federal Register, FDIC BankFind, Congress.gov, Fed RSS, Kalshi KXFED, Polymarket Gamma, Polymarket CLOB, Google DNS-over-HTTPS, CoinGecko. Market-calibrated Fed rate probabilities (60% KXFED / 40% model blend), FDIC bank failure monitoring, atomic economic snapshots, live regulatory pulse, alpha reports with edge analysis and Kelly sizing. Tier 1 government + Tier 3 CFTC-regulated data only.

workflows.name: Web Extraction
workflows.description: Structured web extraction — title, headings, clean text, links, OpenGraph metadata from any URL.

workflows.name: Web Search
workflows.description: Web search with structured result extraction — titles, snippets, URLs.

workflows.name: HTML to Markdown
workflows.description: Convert HTML to clean Markdown. Preserves headings, lists, links, code blocks, tables.

workflows.name: URL Health Check
workflows.description: URL health check — status code, response time, redirect chain, content type.

workflows.name: DNS Lookup
workflows.description: DNS record lookup — A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME.

workflows.name: SSL Certificate Check
workflows.description: SSL certificate inspection — issuer, expiry, SANs, days remaining.

workflows.name: Hash Text
workflows.description: Hash text with SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, SHA-1, or SHA3-256.

workflows.name: Text Diff
workflows.description: Unified diff between two texts with change stats and similarity ratio.

workflows.name: Wikipedia Summary
workflows.description: Wikipedia article summary — extract, thumbnail, description, page URL.

workflows.name: arXiv Search
workflows.description: Search arXiv for academic papers — titles, authors, abstracts, PDF links.

workflows.name: SEC EDGAR Filings
workflows.description: Search SEC EDGAR for company filings — 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K.

workflows.name: Regulatory Risk Scan
workflows.description: Analyze a business against all applicable regulatory frameworks with scored impact assessment.

workflows.name: Prediction Market Signals
workflows.description: Bulk scored signals for all active regulatory prediction markets — HYDRA probability, impact scoring, signal direction. Data from Polymarket Gamma, Polymarket CLOB, and Kalshi KXFED. CFTC-regulated sources only.

workflows.name: Alpha Report
workflows.description: Premium alpha report — regulatory probability, edge vs market price, Kelly sizing, entry price, historical analogues, resolution timeline, trade verdict. Calibrated with Kalshi KXFED market data.

workflows.name: Token Price Lookup
workflows.description: Current price, 24h change, market cap for any listed token.

workflows.name: Economic Snapshot
workflows.description: Atomic real-time economic data from FRED (28 series), BLS employment, Treasury yields, FDIC bank health, and Federal Register rulemakings. All data fetched live at request time from Tier 1 government sources.

workflows.name: Live Regulatory Pulse
workflows.description: Live regulatory pulse from SEC EDGAR full-text search, Federal Register API, and Congress.gov bill tracker. Real-time data fetched at request time — not cached.

workflows.name: FDIC Bank Failure Monitor
workflows.description: FDIC BankFind API — recent bank failures, resolution details, estimated losses, acquiring institutions. Live government data.

workflows.name: Composite Alpha Signal
workflows.description: Composite alpha — regulatory risk + KXFED-calibrated Fed rate probability + prediction market sentiment + directional bias. 13-source data fusion.

workflows.name: Regulatory Risk Score
workflows.description: Real-time 0-100 risk score for any token or protocol based on regulatory exposure and agency attention.

workflows.name: Portfolio Risk Scan
workflows.description: Portfolio-level regulatory risk scan — up to 20 tokens/protocols with aggregate risk and cross-correlation analysis.

workflows.name: Executive Market Brief
workflows.description: Executive market brief — regulatory events + KXFED-calibrated Fed signal + prediction markets in one comprehensive view.
